title: Skill Blueprint Schema
description: Antigravity Skill Factory - Blueprint definition schema. LLM must generate this FIRST before any file creation.

skill_name.description: Unique identifier for the skill. Must not already exist in skill_registry.json.

entry_instruction.description: The primary instruction the skill executes first. Must exist in instruction_graph.

instructions.description: All instruction nodes this skill uses.

guides.description: Guide documents this skill references. Must exist in guide_graph.

tools.description: External tools this skill depends on. Must exist in tool_registry.
